listings.description: ALL OFFERS ARE DUE BY SUNDAY 05/10/26 BY 9PM AND WILL BE PRESENTING THEM TO THE SELLERS ON MONDAY 05/11/2026. Discover the incredible potential in this unique property, perfectly situated on a spacious 1-acre lot with no HOA, an exceptional opportunity for investors or buyers looking to build equity while making it their own. The main level features hardwood flooring throughout and offers a generous family room with a cozy fireplace, creating a warm and inviting space. The kitchen provides convenient access to the carport through a side door and overlooks the dining area, making everyday living easy and functional. The large owner's suite includes an attached bath, accompanied by two additional bedrooms and a full hallway bath. The walkout lower level expands the possibilities with a sizable recreation room featuring classic wood paneling, a spacious non-legal bedroom, a laundry area, and unfinished sections ideal for storage or future customization. Whether you're envisioning updates, renovations, or a full transformation, this home offers the space and flexibility to bring your vision to life. Being sold strictly AS IS, and ideally located just minutes from shopping, dining, and everyday conveniences, this is a rare opportunity you won't want to miss. Photos may be virtually staged

This Is It! Welcome to 301 Shiloh Place! Step inside and take a tour of this Beautiful 4 bedroom, 2 full and 1 half bath home. Over 3600 sqft, stunning hardwood floors and gorgeous updates invite you into this spacious residence, with floor-to-ceiling windows, and a updated modern gourmet kitchen overlooking an expansive backyard with entertainers Deck & Patio. The inviting 2-story foyer creates an inviting first impression, leading you through the wrap-around layout of the main level. Directly off your foyer the private study faces the formal sitting room, framed in crown molding detail. Your formal dining room features a large picture window, and guides you into the great eat-in kitchen, featuring stainless appliances, an excess of cabinet storage, walk-in pantry, and dazzling new quartz countertops throughout, all framing the large center island. From your kitchen, relax in your warm and inviting living room, complete with cozy fireplace. Upper level offers 3 great guest bedrooms, tasteful full guest bath, and extended laundry room, featuring wash sink, washer, dryer, and additional storage options. Your oversized Primary Suite offers grand elegance, with his/hers walk-through closets with custom cabinets, Ensuite with oversized tub and separate walk-in shower, and his/hers extended vanities. Natural light floods through the large windows, looking down over your lush backyard. Full walk-out basement offers an additional 1800 sqft to create your personal bonus rec room, screening room, or home gym! Enjoy the gentle spring air on your custom deck and wrap-around patio, framed with large open yard, featuring space to garden, play, or host outdoor gatherings around the fire-pit. Spacious 2-car garage includes built-in Gladiator Gear tracks and built-in air pressure system. Major updates have been done for you, including HVAC systems on main (2021) and upper (2023) floors, windows and doors (2021), roof replaced (2021), brand new quartz kitchen counters (2026), and freshly painted! Set on a corner lot in the serene community of Beauregard Heights, with NO HOA, this estate is located in a prime location and close to the best of NoVA. Just minutes from historic downtown Leesburg, shopping, dining, wineries, and commuter routes, this stunning property awaits you. Welcome Home!

Looking for a Special Place and Opportunity - Stop Looking and come see this all Brick Beautiful Rambler w/ charming front porch and a side load 2 car attached garage ***Located in Leesburg city limits sited on just under an acre****If you like a little character you will fall in love!*** Home has been in the same family since built and lovingly cared for****Updated Kitchen***Hardwood Floors ****Cozy Finished Lower Level with Wood Burning Brick Fireplace & Lots of storage - interior walk up from Lower level into Garage*** Covered back patio**Two Spacious Outdoor Storage - work shop - she shed or more -- So many possibilities !!!!YOU can buy this and the house next door which is also for sale see MLS# VALO2117374 - Potential multi generational living lifestyle - just in separate places!*******This is zoned residential and in the gateway district - NO HOA!!!!So many possibilities !

Beautifully updated 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath home tucked away on a quiet cul-de-sac in the heart of Leesburg. This move-in ready property features extensive interior upgrades, including fresh modern paint throughout, new carpeting, and updated lighting that creates a bright, cohesive feel across all levels. The renovated kitchen offers updated cabinetry and new countertops, flowing seamlessly into the main living spaces-perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The fully updated primary bathroom showcases modern finishes and a refreshed, spa-like design. Step outside to a private backyard backing to trees, complete with a spacious deck ideal for relaxing or hosting. Additional highlights include enhanced curb appeal with a refreshed front entry and major system updates, including a newer roof (2023) and HVAC (2022). Conveniently located near shopping, dining, and commuter routes, this home offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and location. Don't miss the opportunity to make this exceptional home yours, schedule a showing today!

Buy 1 , 2 or 3 Properties***** This home sits adjacent to two other properties/homes for sale**** Home was owned by the same family and is conveniently located in the Leesburg city limits*****DO YOU LOVE VINTAGE?????? This charming place has a throwback in time feel with original kitchen, baths and floors*****All Brick Rambler with a finished Lower Level ****Offers flexibility in the floor plan*****Two Wood Burning Fireplaces**** Hardwood Floors *****Covered Back Patio ******Includes an attached garage plus a detached garage with workshop and two sheds ****Home can be sold by itself although another Rambler next door could make this an interesting Multi Generational Living Lifestyle - just in separate houses for sale see MLS VALO2117372!****Vacant lot for sale too****** Oh the Possibilities !!! Renovation Potential ******NO HOA

Nestled just a short stroll from the charm of historic Leesburg, VA, and the vibrant amenities of Ida Lee Park & Recreation Center, this custom-built Colonial offers a desirable blend of location, space, elegance, and modern convenience. Lovingly cared for by its original owners, this spacious 6-bed, 2.5-bath home invites you to live and enjoy the very best of this beautiful community! Step inside and experience a thoughtfully designed layout that balances comfort and functionality. The main-level primary suite serves as a private retreat, featuring an ensuite bathroom complete with soaking tub, walk-in shower, and dual vanity, and enjoy the convenience of two spacious walk-in closets. The heart of the home lies in the expansive kitchen, equipped with stainless steel appliances, tile backsplash, recessed lighting, a generous island with bar seating, and sunlit breakfast table area. Step outside the sliding door to the rear patio and enjoy morning coffee or al fresco dining in the peaceful backyard. The main level features a warm and welcoming family room with gas fireplace, a formal living room that easily doubles as a home office, and a butler's pantry connecting to a formal dining room, ideal for entertaining and gatherings. A convenient half bath and a laundry/mudroom with access to the oversized two-car garage add everyday ease. Upstairs, five bedrooms and a full bathroom provide plenty of space and versatility for family, guests, and work from home needs, with the ability to create an additional primary-suite if desired. The home continues to impress with the the full-size basement, framed throughout, roughed-in for a full-size bathroom, and brimming with potential for your vision. Whether you want a sprawling family room/entertainment space, theater, wine cellar, storage, gas fireplace, wet bar, or all the above, it awaits your customization and finishes! With its unbeatable location steps to Leesburg's historic downtown, Ida Lee Rec Center, local cafes, restaurants, retail, events, parks and trails, combined with its versatile layout, designed for convenience, everyday living, and entertainment, this is a truly special opportunity. Welcome home!

Don't miss this beautiful 4 bedroom/2.5 bath colonial in sought after Potomac Crossing! This home has almost 3,000 finished square feet and has been tastefully updated with fresh paint, new flooring, updated kitchen/appliances and more! The main level features a dramatic 2 story foyer, a formal living/dining room w/ bay window, an updated kitchen featuring white cabinets, granite counters, SS appliances and updated flooring that opens to a huge family room w/ dramatic ceilings/windows and fireplace! Get ready to entertain family and friends on your large private deck that overlooks a light filled fenced yard that backs to trees. Head upstairs and you'll find 4 large bedrooms and 2 full baths, including an impressive owners suite complete with walk in closet and luxury bath with dual sinks, soaking tub and separate shower. The unfinished basement features over 1000 square feet and is ready for your imagination. This home is located just mins to Rt 15, Rt 7, shopping, dining, historic downtown Leesburg, Leesburg Premium Outlets, breweries/wineries and more! LOW LOW HOA fees!

The Potomac Crossing Home you've been waiting for! This 2-car garage single family, Lockmeade Model with 4BR, 3.5BA, situated on a fenced, cul-de-sac lot, features numerous upgrades, updates and elegant touches throughout. Highlights include: Water Heater (2025), Upper Heat Pump (2019) Lower HVAC (2016), Garage Doors/Openers w/Smart battery back up (2021), Architectural Roof (2021), Driveway (2024). Other highlights include: 2 fireplaces, screen porch, finished basement w/full bath. Nestled on a quiet cul-de-sac with plenty of overflow parking as well as a location that is a quick trip to Ida Lee Park, Historic Down Town Leesburg, Costco, Target and so much more. All this in the Potomac Crossing neighborhood featuring abundant amenities: pool, tot lot, basket ball, walking paths and more.

This is a hidden gem! In a quiet, sunny neighborhood, large backyard, all brick, large basement with lots of natural light waiting for your personal touches. Located right off the WO&D trails and walking distance into downtown Historic Leesburg. Don't miss this opportunity!

Welcome to 408 Cherry Lane - a fully renovated three-level home offering the look and feel of new construction in the heart of Leesburg. This stunning home features 4 bedrooms and 5 fully renovated bathrooms, with every element of the interior completely brand new from top to bottom. Situated on a private, fully fenced 0.38-acre lot, the property boasts a level backyard and a brand-new paved driveway with dual garage doors equipped with upgraded belt-drive motors, new remotes, and keypads. The exterior showcases all new Low-E argon vinyl windows, PVC trim, a new fiberglass front door, French patio door, LED lighting, a Ring doorbell, and an expansive 30' x 16' Trex double-deck overlooking refreshed landscaping with new sod and plantings. Inside, the home is completely transformed with luxury vinyl plank flooring, fresh paint, upgraded trim, and all interior doors replaced with custom doors and upgraded hardware, along with a stunning chef's kitchen featuring new cabinetry with custom crown molding, a large island, quartz countertops with waterfall edge, tile backsplash, and brand-new Samsung stainless steel appliances. All five bathrooms are fully remodeled with high-end finishes and custom tile work. Additional home upgrades include 48 recessed LED lights, new ceiling fans, updated electrical throughout, a brand-new 200-amp panel, new American Standard HVAC system, water heater, sump pump, washer and dryer, and an epoxy-finished garage floor. Ideally located in a well-established, no-HOA community with access to trails and within walking distance to shopping, dining, and everyday conveniences, this home offers unbeatable proximity to Leesburg Premium Outlets, Costco, and major commuter routes including Route 7 and Route 15, all within a highly sought-after school district.

Beautifully appointed and rich in character, this four-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bath residence by renowned local builder Paul Reimers is ideally situated in the heart of historic downtown Leesburg. Thoughtfully designed and meticulously maintained, the home offers an exceptional blend of timeless craftsmanship and modern convenience. The interior showcases gleaming wood floors that flow seamlessly throughout the main living spaces, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. At the heart of the home, a well-equipped kitchen features stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, and ample cabinetry-perfectly suited for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. A highly desirable main-level primary bedroom offers both comfort and convenience, providing a private retreat with easy accessibility. This thoughtfully positioned space enhances the home's livability, ideal for a variety of lifestyle needs. Upstairs, additional generously sized bedrooms provide flexibility for guests, home office space, or personal retreats, complemented by a well-appointed bath that reflect the home's classic aesthetic. Outdoors, a fully fenced yard creates a private oasis, ideal for relaxation, play, or al fresco gatherings. A large shed adds both functionality and storage, enhancing the property's practical appeal. Set just moments from Leesburg's charming shops, dining, and historic landmarks, this exceptional home presents a rare opportunity to enjoy refined living in one of Northern Virginia's most desirable settings. Photos to be uploaded 4/25

WELCOME TO 314 BELMONT PLACE- Beautifully maintained brick rambler nestled on a private 12-home cul-de-sac, just steps from the W&OD Trail and within walking distance to everything downtown Leesburg has to offer! No HOA. Walkable to Catoctin Elementary and LCHS. The main level features 3 spacious bedrooms and 2 full baths. An updated kitchen seamlessly connects the dining room, flexible informal living space, and a large, light-filled family room. Two sliding glass doors open to the patio and backyard-perfect for effortless indoor-outdoor entertaining. The lower level offers a cozy family room ideal for a home office, playroom, or media space, complete with built-in bookshelves. You'll also find two bonus rooms, a full bath, and abundant storage in the unfinished area. A 2-car garage plus a 10x14 shed provide excellent storage options. The fully fenced, flat backyard completes this exceptional property-offering privacy, space, and versatility.

Welcome to 1106 Dailey Place SW in Leesburg - a beautifully updated split-level home offering 4 bedrooms, 2.5 baths, and exceptional turn-key condition. DON'T MISS THE BONUS 4TH LEVEL DEN & WORKSHOP!! From the moment you step inside, this home feels warm, inviting, and meticulously maintained, with the kind of squeaky-clean presentation that lets you move right in and start enjoying it immediately. The stunning remodeled kitchen is a true centerpiece of the home, featuring stylish updates and a fresh, functional design that makes everyday living and entertaining easy. The layout includes three bedrooms upstairs, while the lower level offers a large family room, a fourth bedroom/den with a bar, a half bath, and laundry room, providing flexible space for guests, a home office, or multi-generational living. There is an additional lower level which features a spacious den and a workshop. Outside, the backyard is truly something special. You will be the envy of your friends and neighbors! It's the picture-perfect environment for your special gatherings and events. Designed to feel like a private retreat, it features a custom koi pond, a new multi-level deck, mature and vibrant flowering trees and shrubs, and a hot tub on the back patio - creating an outdoor oasis that feels like vacation living every day. Major improvements including the remodeled kitchen, newer deck, roof, siding, windows, furnace, A/C, and hot water heater add to the home's appeal and peace of mind. Located in an established Leesburg neighborhood with no HOA, this home also offers convenient access to downtown Leesburg, shopping, dining, parks, and commuter routes.

This is the home you have been waiting for! This is a beautifully fully upgraded smart home with 6 bedrooms/5 Full bathrooms and over 4600 sqft of living space located in the quiet community of Evergreen Meadows. If you have been looking for a first floor Bedroom/bathroom, this is the home for you! On the main level, you will find a lovely formal living and dining room, an over sized kitchen, sunroom and family room to spend your precious moments with your family and friends. Upstairs you will find the Primary Suite of your dreams. After a long day, enjoy some relaxation in the Primary suite sitting room or in the spa tub. Also, you with find Three addition bedrooms, a jack and jill bathroom. In addition, an en suite with a full bathroom. Let's take a stroll down to the basement where you will find an extremely large Recreation Room , Bedroom with Full bathroom and a oversized pre-wired theater room. This home is close to shoppes, Dulles Airport, Restaurants and Highways for quick commutes.

Beautifully renovated and thoughtfully designed for comfort and convenience, this spacious 3-bedroom, 3 full bath home offers true one-level living in a quiet, established neighborhood with no HOA. Situated on a large corner lot, the home features hardwood floors throughout the main level, fresh paint, and new carpet in all bedrooms. Each bedroom includes custom closet built-ins for added organization and functionality. The layout is ideal for a variety of needs, including potential handicap accessibility with a roll-in shower. The updated kitchen is equipped with stove, a new microwave, and plenty of space for cooking and gathering. Step outside to enjoy the brand new Trex deck and freshly landscaped yard-perfect for relaxing or entertaining. Additional upgrades include a new HVAC system (August 2025), gutter guards, and an extra-deep two-car garage offering ample storage. The fully finished basement expands your living space with a potential additional bedroom and a separate outside entrance-ideal for a future in-law suite, studio, home office, or rental opportunity. Conveniently located near shopping, commuter routes, schools, parks, and scenic trails, this move-in ready home offers flexibility, modern updates, and a prime location all in one.

Leesburg Country Club neighborhood (no HOA)!! Beautifully maintained single-family home, ideally located on a quiet cul-de-sac with low traffic. **** Inside, the home is in excellent, move-in ready condition with thoughtful updates throughout. The kitchen features Corian & granite countertops, a center island, stainless steel appliances, & bright, sunny windows. The main level and lower-level family room offer durable & beautiful LVP flooring, while the bedrooms are carpeted. The walkout lower level opens directly to a beautiful slate patio, creating seamless indoor-outdoor flow and additional space for gatherings. There's also a large 4th bedroom and full bath on the lower level! **** Private, fully fenced backyard backing to a scenic hillside (zero water runoff issues!) and mature trees, creating a peaceful, natural setting perfect for relaxing outdoors and entertaining. Lovely landscaping with mature flowering trees throughout the seasons. **** At the end of the cul-de-sac is easy access to Westpark, a county-owned passive park in conservation easement, with 134 acres of walking trails and nature areas-ideal for walking, jogging, dog walking, & birdwatching. **** All of this is just a 5-minute drive to Historic Downtown Leesburg, known for its restaurants, shops, events, and charm. This home offers a rare combination of comfort, privacy, mature landscaping, and convenient access to parks, great schools, & historic downtown Leesburg. It's only a 4-minute drive to Route 7 and the Greenway for easy commuting **** Additional features include a backyard shed, extra storage above the garage, an attached garage, and extensive driveway parking, providing plenty of room for multiple vehicles and guests. **** Enjoy the benefits of public utilities and town services, including road and sidewalk maintenance, trash service, leaf pickup, & snow removal-all without restrictions of an HOA. **** This home offers an exceptional combination of location, condition, outdoor space, and lifestyle, making it a standout opportunity in Leesburg!

Sophisticated Living in the Heart of Leesburg: The Arlington at Greenway Farm Experience the perfect harmony of classic architecture and high-tech modernization in this stunning Arlington model located in the highly coveted Greenway Farm community. With nearly $100,000 invested in enhancements by the current owners, this home offers a turnkey lifestyle of comfort, efficiency, and absolute style. A Masterpiece of Modern Upgrades From the structural essentials to the finest aesthetic details, this residence has been meticulously maintained and thoughtfully improved. Recent Premium Enhancements (Since 2017): Major Infrastructure: A brand-new Roof (2017) and a high-efficiency HVAC system (late 2017) ensure years of worry-free living. Architectural Elegance: The interior was elevated in 2021 with designer wainscoting and updated banisters, complemented by hardwood stairs. Luxury Flooring: Enjoy the warmth of Hardwood floors in the office (2022) Three bedrooms (2025), along with durable LVP flooring throughout the basement (2020). The Screened-In Retreat: A stunning screened-in porch (2021) provides the ultimate outdoor living space, perfect for morning coffee or evening relaxation. High-Tech Integration: Modern connectivity with Ethernet ports installed (2020) and high-end organization via custom closet systems (2024). The driveway was taken out and replaced (and widened) in October of 2025 The laundry room has had custom solid wood shelves added. State-of-the-Art Appliances: A suite of high-performance stainless steel appliances including a new Fridge and Dishwasher (2025) and a new Washer (2026). Legacy Features & Previous Renovations: The foundation of luxury was set with a full kitchen remodel and updated bathrooms, along with premium replacement windows, attic re-insulation, a fenced yard, and a custom basement bar-all providing a level of finish rarely found at this price point. The Interior: Space for Every Story The Arlington model is renowned for its generous proportions and logical flow. Work from Home in Style: The dedicated main-level office features elegant French doors (2022) and custom built-in shelving for a professional, quiet workspace. Entertainer's Dream: Transition from the remodeled gourmet kitchen into the expansive basement, featuring a custom bar-the perfect "hub" for Sunday football or holiday gatherings. Private Sanctuaries: Three bedrooms now feature rich hardwood flooring and the other two bedrooms have carpet for comfort and warmth. 3 TV's and projector in basement and TV in primary bedroom to convey. Garage fridge conveys. The outdoor table on the deck conveys. Location: At the Center of the Leesburg Hub Living in Greenway Farm places you at the doorstep of everything Loudoun County has to offer. Historic Downtown: Just minutes away, enjoy the vibrant atmosphere of Historic Leesburg. Indulge in award-winning dining at King Street's "Restaurant Row," explore local boutiques, or spend Saturdays at the bustling Farmer's Market. Greenway Farm Amenities: This premier community offers a resort-style pool (home of the Gators swim team), tennis and pickleball courts, basketball and sand volleyball courts, and miles of wooded walking trails. Unmatched Access: Located perfectly for the modern commuter with rapid access to the Dulles Greenway, Route 7, and the premier shopping at the Leesburg Premium Outlets and Village at Leesburg.

DELIGHTFUL SUN-SPLASHED SFH ( IN FOXRIDGE COMMUNITY ) ON PIPESTEM RIGHT OFF CUL DE SAC - FRESHLY PAINTED WITH NEW CARPET THROUGHOUT - 3 LEVELS 4 BEDROOMS & 3.5 BATHS. HUGH UPPER LEVEL LOFT AREA THAT COULD EASILY AND AFFORDABLE BE CONVERTED TO ANOTHER BEDROOM IF NEEDED. THE FOXRIDGE COMMUNITY IS JUST A 10 MINUTE WALK TO DOWNTOWN LEESBURG ALONG THE ADJACENT W&O TRIAL THE HOME HAS A LARGE DECK AND PRIVATE BACKYARD

Welcome to this charming 3-bedroom, 3-bath home offering 1,621 square feet of comfortable living space in a desirable Leesburg location. Nestled on a spacious 5-acre lot, this property combines a peaceful setting with convenient access to shopping, dining, and major commuter routes. Inside, you'll find a bright and functional layout with abundant natural light and inviting living areas perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The home features well-sized bedrooms, multiple full baths for added convenience, and a layout designed for flexibility and comfort. Two wood-burning fireplaces-one on the main level and one in the basement-add warmth and character throughout the home. The basement includes a convenient walk-up exit, providing added accessibility and potential for additional use. Step outside to enjoy the rear patio and generous outdoor space-ideal for relaxing, gardening, or hosting gatherings. While the property does need some TLC, it presents a wonderful opportunity for buyers to personalize and make it their own. Don't miss your chance to own in one of Leesburg's sought-after areas!

A Century of Character in Downtown Leesburg Leesburg Historic District, Leesburg, VA 3 BD | 1 BA | 1/3 Acre Lot | Built 1910 | Detached 2-Car Garage | Sold As-Is Steeped in history and full of original charm, this 1910 craftsman-era home sits proudly in the heart of Leesburg's beloved Historic District - lovingly cared for by the same family for over 50 years. Offered for sale as-is, this is a rare chance to own a piece of Leesburg history and make it your own. Step up onto the welcoming covered front porch - the perfect spot for a morning coffee - and into a home that has been cherished across generations. Inside, warm and cozy bedrooms invite rest, while the bathroom retains its original claw-foot tub, a true hallmark of the era. Original hardwood floors are believed to lie beneath the current flooring, waiting to be uncovered and restored to their former glory. The property sits on an exceptional 1/3-acre lot - a genuinely rare find in downtown Leesburg - offering space, privacy, and possibilities that simply don't come along often in this location. A detached two-car garage adds even more practical value. Whether you're a preservation enthusiast, an investor, or a buyer dreaming of restoring a classic home to its original splendor, this property delivers unmatched potential in one of Northern Virginia's most sought-after historic neighborhoods. Properties like this - with this much soul - rarely come to market. HISTORIC DISTRICT NOTICE: This property lies within the Town of Leesburg Historic District. Future exterior renovations and alterations are subject to review and approval by the Leesburg Board of Architectural Review (BAR). Prospective buyers are encouraged to familiarize themselves with applicable guidelines prior to making an offer. ADDITIONAL NOTICE: The home is currently occupied and furnished. AI-assisted editing was used to remove furnishings from interior listing photos. Property is being sold strictly as-is.

Catered Open Houses: Friday 5/15 from 6-8 PM, Saturday 5/16 from 2-4 PM, Sunday 5/17 from 1-3 PM! Tucked into Tavistock Farms, this five-bedroom, three-and-a-half-bath single-family home has the kind of setting buyers hope to find, but rarely do. The home feels warm and welcoming from the moment you step inside. A light-filled sitting room and dining area offer flexible space for everyday living or entertaining, while a private home office provides a dedicated place to work, plan, or focus. Newer flooring throughout the main level gives the home a fresh, cohesive feel. At the center of the home, the renovated kitchen brings together style and function with stainless steel appliances, upgraded countertops, ample cabinetry, and peaceful views of the backyard. It opens easily to the breakfast area and expansive family room, creating a comfortable layout for busy mornings, relaxed evenings, and gatherings with friends or family. An updated powder room adds another polished touch to the main level. Upstairs, four generously sized bedrooms provide room for everyone, with flexibility for guests, hobbies, or additional workspace. The spacious primary suite offers a relaxing retreat, while the secondary bedrooms are practical and comfortable. The lower level includes a fifth legal bedroom, creating even more options for a guest suite, gym, second office, or playroom. The backyard is what truly sets this home apart. Backing to conserved forest, the setting feels private, peaceful, and connected to nature. The expansive deck is ideal for cookouts, morning coffee, or quiet evenings under the trees. Beneath the deck, a tucked-away patio offers another outdoor retreat. The lovingly tended garden includes roses, peonies, a weeping willow, and more, adding beauty and character that takes years to create. Tavistock Farms is beloved for its established charm, tree-lined streets, and convenience to everything Northern Virginia buyers want. Residents enjoy easy access to shopping, dining, commuter routes, and the W&OD Trail, making it easy to balance recreation, commuting, and everyday errands. Whether you're headed into downtown Leesburg, Ashburn, or beyond, this location keeps you connected without sacrificing the peaceful neighborhood feel buyers crave. With modern updates, flexible living space, and rare privacy backing to mature trees, this home offers a strong combination of comfort, function, and setting in one of Leesburg's beloved communities.

Coming Soon - 41726 Stumptown Rd, Leesburg, VA 20176 Nestled on 5.05 private acres, this spacious and versatile property offers the perfect blend of comfort, functionality, and convenience. Boasting over 4,380 finished square feet, this home features 4+ bedrooms and 4 full bathrooms, providing ample space for everyday living and entertaining. Inside, you'll find multiple living areas highlighted by two fireplaces and two wood stoves, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere throughout. The expansive layout offers flexibility for multi-generational living, work-from-home setups, or guest accommodations. Enjoy the outdoors from the large front, side, and rear porches, perfect for relaxing and taking in the scenic surroundings. The property also features an in-ground swimming pool with hot tub, ideal for summer entertaining. Additional highlights include a detached apartment-perfect for guests, rental income, or private office space-and a 1-car garage. Conveniently located just minutes from shopping, grocery stores, local amenities, and Dulles International Airport, this property offers peaceful country living without sacrificing accessibility. More details and professional photos coming soon!

Welcome to this beautifully updated 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath home with a 2-car garage, ideally situated on in the heart of Leesburg. Thoughtfully designed for both comfort and functionality, this spacious residence is perfect for a growing household. Inside, you'll find hardwood flooring throughout, creating a warm and cohesive feel across the home. The layout offers exceptional convenience with two separate laundry areas-one located on the upper level near the bedrooms and an additional setup on the lower level. The fully finished lower level is an ideal space for entertaining or extended living, featuring a large recreation room with a wet bar, two additional bedrooms, and a full bathroom-perfect for guests, an in-law suite, or private workspace. Beyond the home, enjoy easy access to everything Leesburg has to offer. Commuters will appreciate proximity to Route 7, Route 15, and the Dulles Greenway, as well as convenient access to the Ashburn Metro Station (Silver Line). Daily essentials are just minutes away with nearby grocery options including Wegmans, Giant, and Harris Teeter. Leesburg's vibrant dining and shopping scene is right at your doorstep, with popular restaurants such as Tuscarora Mill, Lightfoot Restaurant, Fire Works Pizza, and SideBar all within a short drive. Historic Downtown Leesburg offers charming boutiques, coffee shops, and community events, while nearby parks and trails provide endless outdoor recreation opportunities. This is a home that truly offers the perfect balance of style, space, and location-an exceptional opportunity you won't want to miss.

BEAUTIFUL COLONIAL IN SOUGHT AFTER KINCAID FOREST. THIS HOME HAS 4 BEDROOMS, THREE AND A HALF BATHS AND A TWO CAR GARAGE. ON THE FIRST LEVEL YOU WILL FIND AN OFFICE, FORMAL LIVING ROOM, FORMAL DINING ROOM, HALF BATH, FAMILY ROOM WITH A FIREPLACE AND AN EAT IN KITCHEN LEADING TO A SUNROOM WITH ACCESS TO THE DECK. THE LAUNDRY ROOM IS ALSO LOCATED ON THIS LEVEL. ON THE SECOND LEVEL IS THE PRIMARY BEDROOM WITH ENSUITE BATH, THREE ADDITIONAL BEDROOMS AND A FULL BATH IN THE HALLWAY. THE LOWER LEVEL HAS A FAMILY ROOM WITH A FULL BATH, PLENTY OF STORAGE AND A WALK OUT SLIDING GLASS DOOR LEADING TO A PRIVATE ENCLOSED BACK PATIO. THIS HOME IS A MUST SEE!!!!

Welcome to 20808 Wild Goose Lane-a rare 11.8-acre estate offering luxury living, income potential, and total privacy with NO HOA. This fully renovated 4BR/3BA home showcases a designer kitchen, spa-inspired baths, and high-end finishes throughout. High-speed internet supports remote work, while private Goose Creek access creates a resort-like setting. The walkout lower level features a private in-law suite-ideal for Airbnb or multi-generational living. With ADU potential, the property offers multiple avenues for expansion and long-term value. Outdoors, enjoy a turnkey homestead setup with garden beds, chicken coop, and open land for animals or future structures. Minutes to Leesburg, Middleburg, and top wineries-this is a unique blend of lifestyle, land, and investment upside."

Some Homes Impress you; this one Refuses to be Forgotten. Come tour, explore, and imagine yourself here - you won't want to leave. School Pyramid: Sycolin Creek ES - Watson Mountain MS + Brambleton MS - Independence HS Georgian inspired architecture with two welcoming front porches, manicured landscaping, a level yard, an extended driveway, and a composite deck set a confident tone before you even step inside. Within the home, craftsmanship takes center stage-newly refinished hardwood floors, sculptural lighting, detailed millwork, a two sided gas fireplace, and thoughtfully updated kitchen and baths. High ceilings, graceful columns, and natural light shape a main level that feels both expansive and beautifully composed.
